name: memory
description: User-invoked router for memory and knowledge-persistence skills. Type this skill name to see which to use.
disable-model-invocation: true

# Memory Router

Index of memory and knowledge-persistence skills. Invoke the right skill by name.

| Skill | Use when |
|---|---|
| `remember` | Store lessons learned as domain-organized memory instructions (`/remember [>domain [scope]] lesson`). |
| `read-memories` | Search past session logs to recall prior decisions and context. |
| `graphify` | Build a codebase knowledge graph, onboard into a project, or answer natural-language questions about the code. |

`remember` (write) and `read-memories` (read) are the two ends of personal cross-session memory; `graphify` is the codebase-level memory counterpart.
